name: 11L Int8 + Correlation Decorrelation Regularizer (val_bpb=1.1413)
blurb: Novel information-theoretic decorrelation regularizer applied to the PR #236 stack. Penalizes mean squared off-diagonal correlations in hidden-state correlation matrices during training, encouraging statistical independence across hidden dimensions. Despite 6% step-time overhead (71ms vs 67ms, ~500 fewer steps), achieves comparable BPB to the unregularized baseline (1.1413 vs 1.1400 3-seed mean). The regularizer adds ~25 lines to train_gpt.py and is gated behind TC_ENABLED/TC_LAMBDA env vars.
author: Gabriel Ketron
